name: techflow-tasks
description: Sistema web de gerenciamento ágil de tarefas

scripts.docs:diagrams: mmdc -i docs/diagrams/use-cases.mmd -o docs/diagrams/use-cases.svg -b transparent && mmdc -i docs/diagrams/classes.mmd -o docs/diagrams/classes.svg -b transparent
scripts.docs:pdf: npm run docs:diagrams && md-to-pdf docs/relatorio.md --config-file docs/pdf-config.cjs
